title: You Oughta Know
why_this_song: You Oughta Know by Alanis Morissette (1995) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: It's not fair, to deny me
Of the cross I bear that you gave to me
You seem very well, things look peaceful
I'm sure she'd make a really excellent mother
'Cause the love that you gave that we made
Wasn't able to make it enough for you to be open wide, no
And every time you speak her name

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "gave" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "gave" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm sure she'd make a really excellent mother
Did you forget about me Mr. Duplicity
And every time I scratch my nails

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And every time you speak her name
And I'm here, to remind you

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "You Oughta Know" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "You Oughta Know"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Alanis Morissette one question about "You Oughta Know", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Alanis Morissette sobre "You Oughta Know", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "You Oughta Know" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "You Oughta Know" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
